extraction.one_line_summary: ROGLIČ claimed stage victory by outsprinting LAPORTE and MATTHEWS on the 2km uphill finish after RUTSCH's late solo attempt was caught.
tactical_patterns: PEREZ targeted KOM jersey by cresting four of five climbs first from breakaway, building 29-point cushion.
JUMBO-VISMA controlled peloton maintaining 2-4 minute gap to six-man break, revealing tactical preference for controlled puncheur finishes.
RUTSCH joined ELISSONDE solo late then attacked alone with 17.6km remaining, forcing teams to chase disorganized.
Sprint teams fragmented on 2km uphill finish, allowing GC riders ROGLIČ and VLASOV to contest rather than pure sprinters.

rider_signals.ROGLIČ Primož: positive: Won uphill sprint finish convincingly while defending GC, demonstrating classics-ready form targeting Liège-Bastogne-Liège
rider_signals.LAPORTE Christophe: positive: Second place on 2km uphill finish shows unexpected puncheur capability beyond pure sprint lead-out duties
rider_signals.MATTHEWS Michael: positive: Third despite race positioning for him; suggests strong uphill sprint form adaptable to classics terrain
rider_signals.MCNULTY Brandon: negative: Abandoned from third overall after crash, critical weakness in positioning/bike handling under race pressure
rider_signals.PEREZ Anthony: positive: Aggressive KOM hunting from breakaway built commanding 29-point lead, telegraphing willingness to sacrifice position for jersey
rider_signals.ELISSONDE Kenny: neutral: Made break and went solo but caught before RUTSCH attack; strong breakaway legs insufficient for late solo
rider_signals.RUTSCH Jonas: positive: Bridged to ELISSONDE then soloed with 17.6km out, showing aggressive instincts and tactical race-reading for young rider
rider_signals.VLASOV Aleksandr: negative: Mechanical and puncture forced chase back to peloton, revealing equipment or positioning vulnerabilities
rider_signals.SCHACHMANN Maximilian: negative: Multiple mechanicals requiring chase back, concerning reliability pattern before critical stages
rider_signals.COQUARD Bryan: positive: Seventh place as pure sprinter on 2km uphill finish exceeded expectations for terrain adaptability
